name: XMemo for OpenClaw
description: Native XMemo cloud-memory provider for OpenClaw agents: long-term memory, semantic recall, TODOs, snapshots, and audit tools. Pair with the XMemo Skill for recall-first workflow guidance.

baseUrl.label: XMemo Service URL
baseUrl.help: Hosted XMemo is ready at https://xmemo.dev. Most users should keep this default; change it only for a private/self-hosted service.

apiKey.label: XMemo API Key
apiKey.help: Create a scoped API key in XMemo Memory Console -> API Keys -> Create API key. Prefer setting XMEMO_KEY instead of storing the key here. Public discovery/config metadata never includes user tokens.

token.label: XMemo Token (deprecated)
token.help: Deprecated alias for apiKey. Prefer apiKey or the XMEMO_KEY environment variable.

authMode.label: Auth Mode
authMode.help: How to send the credential: api-key (X-API-Key header), bearer (Authorization: Bearer), or both.

bucket.label: Default Bucket
bucket.help: Default bucket for memories created by OpenClaw.

scope.label: Default Scope
scope.help: Optional scope for memories created by OpenClaw.

readBucket.label: Read Bucket
readBucket.help: Advanced read filter for recall/search. Keep % to search all visible user-owned XMemo buckets across connected agents.

readScope.label: Read Scope
readScope.help: Advanced read filter for recall/search. Leave empty to use the token default and avoid narrowing cross-agent recall.

teamId.label: Team ID
teamId.help: Optional team/organization id for enterprise XMemo deployments.

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Advanced attribution override. The plugin already defaults this non-secret value to openclaw, so normal users do not need to change it.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically persist high-signal decisions and fixes to XMemo.

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture.

customTriggers.label: Custom Auto-Capture Triggers
customTriggers.help: Additional words or phrases that trigger auto-capture (case-insensitive).

recallMaxChars.label: Recall Query Max Chars
recallMaxChars.help: Maximum prompt/query length sent to XMemo for recall.

recallMaxItems.label: Recall Max Items
recallMaxItems.help: Maximum number of memories returned by XMemo recall.

recallMaxTokens.label: Recall Max Tokens
recallMaxTokens.help: Maximum token budget for the recalled context package.
